title: EMRSs IN UTTAR PRADESH
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Tribal Affairs

EMRSs IN UTTAR PRADESH

Posted On:
12 MAR 2026 4:35PM by PIB Delhi

Union Minister of State for Tribal Affairs Shri Durgadas Uikey informed Lok Sabha that Ministry of Tribal Affairs regularly reviews the progress made in Eklavya Model Residential Schools (EMRSs) by States/UTs across the country including Uttar Pradesh. The students enrolment in EMRSs in Uttar Pradesh has increased by 113 percent from 495 (2020-21) to 1056 (2025-26). The details of EMRSs in the state of Uttar Pradesh along with their location is given below:

S. No.

District

Block/ Taluka

Name of the School

Functioning Status

Building Construction Status

1

Bahraich

EMRS Bojhiya

2

3

Bar

EMRS Lalitpur

Non- Functional

Completed

4

Sonbhadra

Chopan (Kun)

EMRS Piparkhand

Functional

Completed

***

(Release ID: 2238945)
